---
agent: 'agent'
description: 'Save the current session plan under the repo'
---

1. Take the current session plan (`plan.md` from the session folder) and fit it into the template at `.github/plans/template.md`. The saved plan should be self-contained with only enough detail so a fresh agent with clear context should be able to implement the changes based on the plan.
2. Save the result to `.github/docs/plans/<YYYY-MM-DD>_<kebab-case summary derived from the plan>.md`.
